meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering Claude Code Skills for SaaS Projects
content.seo_description: Break through the student wall. Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build complex, production-ready SaaS applications. Master your workflow today.
content.answer_block: Break through your plateau by integrating Claude Code with Antigravity. This workflow automates architectural scaffolding, allowing you to focus on high-level logic rather than boilerplate. By leveraging AI-driven CLI agents, you can rapidly iterate from basic tutorials to robust, deployable production-grade SaaS applications in half the development time.
content.intro:
You have built the to-do apps and the basic weather widgets, but now you are hitting the 'student wall.' Your code is messy, you don't know how to structure a database, and the leap to a real-world SaaS feels like an insurmountable chasm. You feel stuck in a loop of endless tutorials that never quite prepare you for the chaos of a blank IDE.

It is time to evolve. By integrating Claude Code into your local environment, you stop being a student who follows instructions and start being an architect who commands them. This case study shows you how to bridge that gap, transforming your development process from manual trial-and-error into a streamlined, AI-assisted engineering workflow.

steps.title: Environment Scaffolding
steps.description: Initialize your project structure using Antigravity to establish a professional folder hierarchy that meets industry standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a scalable folder structure for a Next.js SaaS application, including /src, /lib, /components, and /types folders with basic configuration files.

steps.title: Defining the Domain Model
steps.description: Use Claude Code to translate your business requirements into a robust database schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a user authentication and subscription management system with roles for free and premium tiers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on user requirements'

steps.title: API Route Generation
steps.description: Streamline backend development by instructing Claude Code to build type-safe API handlers based on your schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure Next.js API route that handles user registration and validates input using Zod.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create api route for registration with zod validation'

steps.title: UI Component Assembly
steps.description: Map your backend logic to frontend components using systematic AI-driven generation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard sidebar component using Tailwind CSS and Lucide React icons.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate dashboard sidebar component with tailwind'

steps.title: Integration Testing
steps.description: Ensure your app works as a cohesive system by running automated integration tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Playwright test suite to verify the end-to-end user login flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate playwright tests for login flow'

pro_tips: Always define a custom .claudeprompt file in your root to force the AI to adhere to your specific coding standards.
Use Claude Code's 'review' command before every commit to catch logic errors you might have missed during rapid prototyping.
Chain your Antigravity prompts by referencing previous architectural decisions to maintain consistency across the entire codebase.
Configure your local environment variables with placeholders for Claude Code to suggest secure secret management patterns.
Use 'claude run' to perform refactoring tasks on older, messy code blocks to instantly modernize your legacy student projects.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully built your MVP using this workflow, deploy it to Vercel or Railway and share the link in our community showcase to receive expert code reviews.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for the sake of learning and start building for the sake of impact. Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
